rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF BANFORD WONG
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Order That Decedents Real Property Is An Asset Of Probate Estate And Not An Asset Of His Purported Trust
rulings.Rulings: Appearance required. Issues are: 1) Court to determine whether petition can be granted as requested; and 2) Kevin Fong, nominated successor trustee, was not given notice of the amended petition. In addition, counsel to provide revised proposed order to include legal decription of real property.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF JONATHAN SCOTT BUSHNELL
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
rulings.Rulings: hearing. appearance required by Administrator and attorney, due to distribution from estate without prior court approval. also, the amendment filed 7/25/17 was neither signed nor verified by the Administrator. prior to the hearing, this defect must be cured (see Local Rule 14.18.B.). counsel will be asked for a file stamped copy at the hearing. no hearing notes will be sent.

rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
